impact: This advances the PP&D daemon repair tranche by committing deterministic coverage that models the supervisor case where checkbox-176 and checkbox-178 are blocked and verifies the next selectable work is daemon repair, not parked domain work.
summary: Add narrow daemon task-selection regression coverage for the blocked-domain fallback path.
target_task: Task checkbox-180: Add daemon task-selection regression coverage proving that when every domain task is blocked, the supervisor appends or selects a narrow daemon-repair task instead of revisiting blocked checkbox-176 or checkbox-178 work.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
